cases.prompt: Run a report-only senior review of change.diff. Inspect the repository files in this fixture, not only the patch.
rubric: Finds the existing shared cache-key capability by reading beyond the diff.
Raises it in the architecture verdict with a concrete reuse direction.
Does not bury the design issue under line-level commentary.

cases.prompt: Run a report-only senior review of change.diff. The export endpoint handles customer records. Inspect the implementation and tests in the fixture.
rubric: Proves that a caller can pass redact_pii=false and bypass the intended invariant.
Derives severity from customer-data exposure rather than calling it a style issue.
Recommends assignment or rejecting the override, plus a regression test.

cases.prompt: Run a report-only senior review of change.diff. Report only findings that pass the evidence gate.
rubric: Accounts for the changed files and confirms pagination boundary coverage was reviewed and tested; exact test names are not required.
Does not manufacture a bug or pad the review with style nits.
States any residual validation gap concisely.
